title: Email Spam Classifier
short: Multinomial Naive Bayes classifier achieving over 97% accuracy using NLTK + scikit-learn pipeline.
longHtml:
Built a complete NLP pipeline to classify emails as spam or ham. Used NLTK for tokenization and lemmatization, TF-IDF vectorization, and a Multinomial Naive Bayes model trained on the Enron dataset. Achieved 97.3% accuracy with precision/recall carefully balanced to minimize false positives.

Tech: Python, scikit-learn, NLTK, pandas

title: Micro-OS Portfolio (v1)
short: A fully windowed, browser-based desktop shell with drag-and-drop apps built in native JS.
longHtml:
Designed and implemented a windowed OS interface running entirely in the browser. Featured a custom Window Manager, draggable windows, a taskbar, and four distinct application modules including a Python Playground, Resume Timeline, and Generative Art generator.

Tech: Vanilla JS, ES Modules, D3.js, Pyodide, Monaco Editor

title: This Portfolio Website
short: A scrolling portfolio with Islamic geometric backgrounds, live Python playground, and animated timeline.
longHtml:
A fully reimagined portfolio featuring a parametric Islamic geometry background that morphs based on scroll position, a live in-browser Python IDE powered by Pyodide in a Web Worker, and an interactive D3 project timeline.

Tech: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JS, D3, Pyodide, Monaco Editor
